title: “Atrocious”: Supreme Court stays Madras HC order restraining TVK MLA from voting in floor tests
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday stayed the Madras High Court order by which it had restrained Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) MLA R Seenivasa Sethupathi from voting in any floor test or trust vote in the Tamil Nadu Legislative Assembly [Seenivasa Sethupathi Vs Periakaruppan].A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath, Sandeep Mehta and Vijay Bishnoi termed the High Court order as "atrocious" since the same came to be passed in an Article 226 petition filed by Sethupathi's opposing candidate, and not an elect
